flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Santa Clara University rose 20% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.6k → $14.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Santa Clara University rose 13% between 2007 and 2010 ($33.0k → $37.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Santa Clara University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Santa Clara University are 68% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($109.2k vs $64.9k).
